creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to fcsk.aim from comment #8)
I tried it myself before i answer your previous post :)

**note that -mysql_config is incorrect :) you should use `mysql_config --cflags` or `mysql_config --cxxflags` with "`" sign instead of all -I/usr/include/blah as parameters of cc (ie, cc source.c -I. `mysql_config --cflags`)

Do this, if not worked please post your sample (the parts that you can :D).
And it's my pleasure to help :)
